hooks.command: uv run python scripts/mcp-call.py memory_search '{"query": "$TOOL_INPUT_file_path", "limit": 3}' 2>/dev/null | head -20 || true
uv run python scripts/mcp-call.py memory_search '{"query": "$TOOL_INPUT_command", "limit": 3}' 2>/dev/null | head -20 || true
uv run python scripts/mcp-call.py hooks_route '{"task": "$TOOL_INPUT_command"}' 2>/dev/null | head -10 || true
uv run python scripts/mcp-call.py memory_search '{"query": "$TOOL_INPUT_file_path", "limit": 3}' 2>/dev/null | head -30 || true
uv run python scripts/mcp-call.py memory_store '{"abstract": "Reading: $TOOL_INPUT_file_path", "category": "file_access"}' 2>/dev/null || true
uv run python scripts/mcp-call.py memory_search '{"query": "$TOOL_INPUT_pattern", "limit": 3}' 2>/dev/null | head -20 || true
uv run python scripts/mcp-call.py hooks_route '{"task": "$TOOL_INPUT_subagent_type"}' 2>/dev/null | head -10 || true
uv run python scripts/mcp-call.py memory_store '{"abstract": "Edited: $TOOL_INPUT_file_path", "category": "file_edit"}' 2>/dev/null || true
uv run python scripts/mcp-call.py memory_store '{"abstract": "Ran: $TOOL_INPUT_command", "category": "command"}' 2>/dev/null || true
uv run python scripts/mcp-call.py session_begin '{"session_id": "claude-'$(date +%s)'"}' 2>/dev/null || true
uv run python scripts/mcp-call.py session_end '{"session_id": "claude-session", "quality_score": 0.8}' 2>/dev/null || true
